html:for-each.declare: <FILTRO oi_clase_org="" gcustom="" oi_empresa="164" fecha_desde1="20001116" fecha_hasta1="20131116" l_uniforme="1" l_elemento="1" gpers="" activos="1" nombre="" documento="" sexo="" grupo_sanguineo="" listlegajos="" oi_indic_activo="" egresado="" oi_forma_pago="" oi_tipo_personal="" fecha_desde="" fecha_hasta="" oi_centro_costo="" oi_convenio="" soloconvenio="" oi_categoria="" oi_ubicacion_desde="" oi_ubicacion_hasta="" oi_estructura="" escructura_childs="" oi_contrato="" oi_afjp="" oi_obra_social="" oi_sindicato="" legID="" leg_where=""> <PERSONAS> <ROW VALUES="11471,11497,11498,11499,11500,11501,11503,11505,11506,11509,11464,11511,11513,11514,11554,11470,11510"/> </PERSONAS> </FILTRO>

qry:select.name: QRY_EMPRESA
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT PER02.e_numero_legajo as leg, PER02.oi_personal_emp, EMP.c_empresa, EMP.d_empresa, PER01.d_ape_y_nom FROM ORG03_EMPRESAS AS EMP, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP AS PER02, PER01_PERSONAL AS PER01 JOIN EMP.oi_empresa INNER PER02.oi_empresa, PER02.oi_personal INNER PER01.oi_personal WHERE PER02.oi_personal_emp in ({%=#PARAM:@VALUES%}) ORDER BY c_empresa ASC, leg asc ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: QRY_DATOS
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' {%? (string(#PARAM:@l_uniforme)='1' AND string(#PARAM:@l_elemento)!='1') {% SELECT PER02.e_numero_legajo as leg, PER02.oi_personal_emp, EMP1.c_empresa, EMP1.d_empresa, PER01.d_ape_y_nom, UNIF_PER.f_desde as f_entrega, UNIF.d_uniforme as uni_ele, ME.d_mot_entrega as mot_ent, UNIF_PER.e_cantidad as cant FROM ORG03_EMPRESAS AS EMP1, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP AS PER02, PER02_UNIF_PER AS UNIF_PER, ORG16_UNIFORMES AS UNIF, PER01_PERSONAL AS PER01, PER37_MOT_ENTREGA as ME JOIN EMP1.oi_empresa INNER PER02.oi_empresa, PER02.oi_personal INNER PER01.oi_personal, PER02.oi_personal_emp INNER UNIF_PER.oi_personal_emp, UNIF_PER.oi_uniforme INNER UNIF.oi_uniforme, UNIF_PER.oi_mot_entrega LEFT OUTER ME.oi_mot_entrega WHERE PER02.oi_personal_emp in ({%=#PARAM:@VALUES%}) {%?($PARAM/@fecha_desde1 !=''){% and UNIF_PER.f_desde >= {$PARAM/@fecha_desde1} %}{% %}%} {%?($PARAM/@fecha_hasta1 !=''){% and UNIF_PER.f_desde <= {$PARAM/@fecha_hasta1} %}{% %}%} ORDER BY uni_ele ASC, f_entrega ASC %} {% %} %} {%? (string(#PARAM:@l_elemento)='1' AND string(#PARAM:@l_uniforme)!='1') {% SELECT PEM.e_numero_legajo as leg, PEM.oi_personal_emp, EMP2.c_empresa, EMP2.d_empresa, PER.d_ape_y_nom, EPP.f_entrega as f_entrega, ELE.d_elemento_pp as uni_ele, EPP.c_motivo_entrega as mot_ent, EPP.e_cantidad as cant FROM ORG03_EMPRESAS AS EMP2, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP AS PEM, PER01_PERSONAL AS PER, PER02_EPP_PER AS EPP, ORG07_ELEMENTOS_PP AS ELE JOIN EMP2.oi_empresa INNER PEM.oi_empresa, PEM.oi_personal INNER PER.oi_personal, PEM.oi_personal_emp INNER EPP.oi_personal_emp, EPP.oi_elemento_pp INNER ELE.oi_elemento_pp WHERE PEM.oi_personal_emp in ({%=#PARAM:@values%}) {%?($PARAM/@fecha_desde1 !=''){% and EPP.f_entrega >= {$PARAM/@fecha_desde1} %}{% %}%} {%?($PARAM/@fecha_hasta1 !=''){% and EPP.f_entrega <= {$PARAM/@fecha_hasta1} %}{% %}%} ORDER BY uni_ele ASC, f_entrega ASC %} {% %} %} {%? ((string(#PARAM:@l_elemento)!='1' and string(#PARAM:@l_uniforme)!='1') OR (string(#PARAM:@l_elemento)='1' and string(#PARAM:@l_uniforme)='1')) {% SELECT PER02.e_numero_legajo as leg, PER02.oi_personal_emp, EMP1.c_empresa, EMP1.d_empresa, PER01.d_ape_y_nom, UNIF_PER.f_desde as f_entrega, UNIF.d_uniforme as uni_ele, ME.d_mot_entrega as mot_ent, UNIF_PER.e_cantidad as cant FROM ORG03_EMPRESAS AS EMP1, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP AS PER02, PER02_UNIF_PER AS UNIF_PER, ORG16_UNIFORMES AS UNIF, PER01_PERSONAL AS PER01, PER37_MOT_ENTREGA as ME JOIN EMP1.oi_empresa INNER PER02.oi_empresa, PER02.oi_personal INNER PER01.oi_personal, PER02.oi_personal_emp INNER UNIF_PER.oi_personal_emp, UNIF_PER.oi_uniforme INNER UNIF.oi_uniforme, UNIF_PER.oi_mot_entrega LEFT OUTER ME.oi_mot_entrega WHERE PER02.oi_personal_emp in ({%=#PARAM:@VALUES%}) {%?($PARAM/@fecha_desde1 !=''){% and UNIF_PER.f_desde >= {$PARAM/@fecha_desde1} %}{% %}%} {%?($PARAM/@fecha_hasta1 !=''){% and UNIF_PER.f_desde <= {$PARAM/@fecha_hasta1} %}{% %}%} UNION SELECT PEM.e_numero_legajo as leg, PEM.oi_personal_emp, EMP2.c_empresa, EMP2.d_empresa, PER.d_ape_y_nom, EPP.f_entrega as f_entrega, ELE.d_elemento_pp as uni_ele, EPP.c_motivo_entrega as mot_ent, EPP.e_cantidad as cant FROM ORG03_EMPRESAS AS EMP2, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP AS PEM, PER01_PERSONAL AS PER, PER02_EPP_PER AS EPP, ORG07_ELEMENTOS_PP AS ELE JOIN EMP2.oi_empresa INNER PEM.oi_empresa, PEM.oi_personal INNER PER.oi_personal, PEM.oi_personal_emp INNER EPP.oi_personal_emp, EPP.oi_elemento_pp INNER ELE.oi_elemento_pp WHERE PEM.oi_personal_emp in ({%=#PARAM:@values%}) {%?($PARAM/@fecha_desde1 !=''){% and EPP.f_entrega >= {$PARAM/@fecha_desde1} %}{% %}%} {%?($PARAM/@fecha_hasta1 !=''){% and EPP.f_entrega <= {$PARAM/@fecha_hasta1} %}{% %}%} ORDER BY uni_ele ASC, f_entrega ASC %} {% %} %} ')/ROWS/ROW, $s in $LEG/EMP join $r/@oi_personal_emp inner $s/@oi_personal_emp

span.a: CONSTANCIA DE ENTREGA DE ROPA DE TRABAJO Y ELEMENTOS DE PROTECCIÓN PERSONAL
